name: Chili Piper
description: Manage Chili Piper scheduling links, meetings, routing rules, and teams. Admin only. Experimental.
longDescription: ChiliPiper MCP server for lead routing and scheduling. Route leads through Concierge routers, generate booking links, manage scheduling, and handle inbound lead routing from any MCP-compatible client.
author: com.chilipiper
examplePrompts: Route this lead to the inbound-demo router
Generate a booking link for the sales team
Check if my ChiliPiper config is working
